1132.issue: [W1132] [io-package.json](https://github.com/Uwe1958/ioBroker.bluesound/blob/master/io-package.json): instanceObject "info.name" common.role "media.player.name" is not a known ioBroker state role

1133.issue: [W1133] [io-package.json](https://github.com/Uwe1958/ioBroker.bluesound/blob/master/io-package.json): instanceObject "control.shuffle" role "media.mode.shuffle" expects common.type to be one of [number], but found "boolean"

3032.issue: [S3032] Just for Info: No workflow run for "test-and-release.yml" triggered by tag "v1.3.0" was found for current release 1.3.0. Workflow logs might be deleted already.

5601.issue: [S5601] i18n directory "admin/i18n" uses long format ({lang}/translations.json). Consider migrating to short format ({lang}.json) using "npm run translate convert".

5612.issue: [W5612] "admin/jsonConfig.json/items/TimeOut" attribute "label" uses key "Timeout" which is not found in the English translation file at "admin/i18n/en".

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.6.0" at [package.json](https://github.com/Uwe1958/ioBroker.bluesound/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 22. Downgrade to node.js 22.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
